scoring: zero-shot masked-marginal, single substitutions only, sliding window for >1022aa
finding: Harness reproduces published ESM2-650M zero-shot on the FULL 217-assay benchmark: median 0.49 vs official 0.484 (+0.006); mean 0.429 vs 0.4382 (-0.009). All 217 assays scored, 0 errors.
scale_finding: 650M is the PEAK of the ESM2 family on ProteinGym. 3B and 15B regress monotonically on per-assay median (0.484 -> 0.467 -> 0.438), per-assay mean, and the published Average_Spearman. Corroborates the humsavar n=7 result (mean paired delta 650M->3B = -0.021).
aggregation_caveat: Published Average_Spearman (0.414 for 650M) is the mean of the 5 function-category averages, NOT a per-assay mean (0.438). Do not compare directly.
residual_differences: assays with <10 scorable variants dropped (none triggered: 217/217 scored)
own sliding-window + spearman implementation, not ProteinGym's scorer
